accommodations.text: Provide a word bank for written-response items in reading and history.
accommodations.source_quote: provide a word bank for written-response items

accommodations.text: Give advance warning before transitions and changes in routine.
accommodations.source_quote: advance warning before transitions and changes in routine

accommodations.text: Do not penalize articulation errors in graded oral work.
accommodations.source_quote: do not penalize articulation errors in graded oral work

accommodations.text: Break multi-step directions into chunked, numbered steps.
accommodations.source_quote: break multi-step directions into numbered steps

accommodations.text: Allow additional wait time for verbal responses.
accommodations.source_quote: additional wait time for verbal responses

accommodations.text: Provide audio versions of grade-level texts.
Use the personal FM/DM listening system in every class.
accommodations.source_quote: personal FM/DM listening system in every class

accommodations.text: Provide 50% extended time on classroom assessments.

services.source_quote: Speech and language therapy social communication 30 minutes weekly
Specialized academic instruction 50 minutes twice weekly

goals.text: Sofia will retell a short narrative with a beginning, middle, and end in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Retells a narrative with only a beginning in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: retell a short narrative with a beginning, middle, and end

goals.text: Ethan will complete and submit in-class assignments in 4 of 5 opportunities without redirection.
goals.baseline: Completes in-class assignments in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: complete and submit in-class assignments in 4 of 5 opportunities

goals.text: Oscar will maintain a topic across three conversational turns in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Maintains a topic for one turn in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: maintain a topic across three conversational turns
